# patterns-hero

**Count:** 88 SVG files (target: 30 — exceeds)
**Source:** Hero Patterns — https://heropatterns.com (authored by Steve Schoger, CC BY 4.0)
**Acquired:** 1:1 recreation from the public CSS / SVG pattern definitions on heropatterns.com, plus additional patterns of the same family. Each file is a tileable SVG matching the numbered Hero Patterns set (`001-jigsaw.svg` through `030-happy-intersection.svg`) plus supplementary tileable patterns.

## Top 10 picks for Clawmachine

1. `004-topography.svg` — classic Hero topography; low-opacity backdrop for evaluator dashboards.
2. `010-graph-paper.svg` — engineering-drawing feel; workbench / repair-record screens.
3. `005-texture.svg` — subtle noise texture; break up flat dark backgrounds without dominating.
4. `007-architect.svg` — blueprint feel; aligns with "fix-and-flip workshop" vibe.
5. `017-hexagons.svg` — cyber / tech geometry; status / health panels.
6. `022-death-star.svg` — dense dot field; empty-state hero backdrop.
7. `020-temple.svg` — repeating architectural motif; landing / login.
8. `025-overlapping-hexagons.svg` — layered hex; agent-orchestration graphic.
9. `026-4-point-stars.svg` — spark pattern; accent / highlight surfaces.
10. `013-falling-triangles.svg` — directional motion feel; onboarding progress backgrounds.

## Layout

Flat. Filenames prefixed with 3-digit order `001-` through `088-` where known.

## Tiling

Each SVG has a viewBox sized to its natural tile and renders cleanly when used as `background-image: url(...); background-repeat: repeat;`.
